message:
🐛 Fix coverage test regressions introduced by #10991 and #10990 (#10995)

DashboardCustomizer.test.tsx: customizerNav.ts imports LayoutGrid from
lucide-react; add it to the vi.mock so all 9 DashboardCustomizer tests
can execute and contribute to coverage.

useDeployMissions-pure.test.ts: PR #10990 patched loadMissions() to
normalize stored missions with targetClusters:[] for null-safety.
The 'returns missions from primary storage key' fixture was missing
this field, causing a 4-vs-5-key deepEqual mismatch.

Both fixes unblock the 10 failing tests in coverage-hourly, restoring
coverage to ≥91%.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
